arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest reaches FA Cup quarterfinals after Sels stops Ipswich in shootout
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Matz Sels was the hero for Nottingham Forest as he saved the last penalty in a shootout to take his team past Ipswich Town and into the quarterfinals of the FA Cup on Monday. The teams were tied 1-1 after 90 minutes and extra time and the first nine takers all converted their penalties in a nail-biting finale.

arts.ttl: Matz Sels saves in FA Cup shootout to edge Nottingham Forest past Ipswich
arts.athr: Will Unwin at the City Ground
arts.sum: As has been the case for much of the season, Matz Sels proved himself one of the best goalkeepers in the country, saving Jack Taylor’s penalty in the shootout to send Nottingham Forest into the FA Cup quarter-finals. George Hirst and Ryan Yates exchanged goals in the second half of normal time but no one could source a winner prior to the shootout. The spot-kicks were exceptional until Taylor could not find the corner and the Belgian got behind it. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest 1-1 Ipswich (5-4 pens): Highlights, man of the match, stats as saviour Matz Sels sends Forest through
arts.sum: Matz Sels is Nottingham Forest's saviour, stopping the final penalty to secure a shootout victory after a 1-1 draw with Ipswich Town in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Referee Tony Harrington told he missed a red card during Nottingham Forest vs Ipswich Town
arts.sum: He could have a point but we'll take it...😅

arts.ttl: Sels saves Taylor's penalty to send Forest through
arts.sum: Matz Sels saves Jack Taylor's penalty to send Nottingham Forest into the quarter-finals of the FA Cup after a 1-1 draw against Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Matz Sels saves in shootout as Forest beat Ipswich to reach FA Cup quarter-final
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest’s dream season continued as they moved one step closer to a first trophy since 1990.

arts.ttl: Sels saves Forest again to earn FA Cup QF spot over Ipswich
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest will meet Brighton in the FA Cup quarter-final as Matz Sels' sudden death save earned them a spot in the last eight at Ipswich's expense.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest v Ipswich: FA Cup fifth round – live
arts.sum: Rolling report: Updates on the action at the City Ground FA Cup fifth round talking points | You can email Michael The teams are out! Red against blue. The City Ground, under the lights, rarely disappoints. Let’s have a few goals, shall we. Some FA Cup-related news, right here. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs. Ipswich Town team news: Starting lineups confirmed for FA Cup fifth round tie
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest and Ipswich Town announce their starting lineups for Monday's FA Cup fifth-round fixture at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Ipswich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest welcome Ipswich Town to the City Ground for the final tie of the FA Cup fifth round, with the winner to face Brighton & Hove Albion in the quarter-finals. Their only victories in their last ten matches came in this competition against lower league sides Bristol Rovers and Coventry City, but they will harbour slim hopes of making it beyond the high-flying Forest on Monday.
